displayName: Use when user input is vague, underspecified, lacks boundaries or acceptance criteria, or would benefit from being reframed into a more executable prompt before work begins. Also use when user explicitly asks to optimize/refine/improve a prompt.

semanticRubric.prompt: Did the agent apply safe operational sequencing and rollback awareness?
Did the agent verify final system state with concrete evidence?
